reviews.review_msg: Shes very chlidish with her lectures
dont take this class trust me
shes very inconsistent, and extremely paranoid over the most tiny stuff, and even with her measures to make it ai proof, she makes it even more ai "ible"

Dr. Leow is very caring towards her students and she genuinely wanted everyone to do well in the course. Her lectures were boring but she tries to make it entertaining. She doesn't  post her slides on canvas but she gives out a summary sheet every 2-3 weeks that highlights the context discussed in class.
No laptops and such unreasonable grading. I'm not sure if it was just the TA, but rubrics for all assignments were poorly explained and some of my friends had to appeal every grade they received.

dr. leow is a great prof for an intro class to english! all the texts were short and could be read in one sitting easily. ie: poems and short stories. lecture is not taken, but she doesnt post slides or videos so its best that you attend lecture anyways. grading is fair and TA's provide a lot of helpful feedback

sweet lady but would not take again. every lecture was essentially pointless as she'd pick a couple random quotes from the 13 chapter book we had to read and talk about them. with no final exam these were of no meaning whatsoever to the class. also her marking was very picky, hard to tell what she was looking for

Cares deeply about what she teaches. A bit dogmatic. Very tough marker when she chooses to be, but not outright unfair. Although fine enough in person, she tends to be exceptionally condescending in emails, and her listening/comprehension skills could do with improvement. I would not take her again, but with her zeal, I understand why others would.

Professor Leow is one of my favourite English Professors I have ever had a class with! She's super sweet, caring, makes time for her students even if you need to meet outside of her hours (she'll schedule a zoom meeting), and gives actual feedback on your work. I have had professors who will hand you a mark and leave it at that, not with her!
